text.title: Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (precondition_pass, downstream_consumer, stakes) to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all "Applies If" bullets hold AND no "Skip If" bullet matches?

conclusion.verdict: skip Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric; route to the correct methodology

branch.question: Is there a downstream consumer (agent OR human reviewer) for the artefact?

conclusion.verdict: single-use throwaway; do not pay the contract overhead

branch.question: Stakes level — does a wrong decision block a release or trigger a regulator?

conclusion.verdict: run Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric; review_for_compliance gate via opus
run Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric; synthesize_artefact via sonnet
run Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric but cap at one instance; draft_inputs_summary via haiku

text.example: precondition_pass=true → downstream_consumer=true → stakes=medium → conclusion r2-typed-input: run Debt Interest Vs Principal Rubric with named owner, synthesize via sonnet.
